Submodules¶

pysnap.errors module¶

Custom exceptions used by PySnap.

exception pysnap.errors.PySnapError[source]¶

Bases: Exception

Base exception for application-level failures.

exception pysnap.errors.CommandExecutionError(command, stdout, stderr)[source]¶

Bases: PySnapError

Represent a failed VBoxManage command execution.

Parameters:

  • command (list[str])

  • stdout (str)

  • stderr (str)

Return type:

None

exception pysnap.errors.VMNotFoundError(vm_name)[source]¶

Bases: PySnapError

Report that a requested virtual machine does not exist.

Parameters:

vm_name (str)

Return type:

None

exception pysnap.errors.VMDependencyError(subject, dependents)[source]¶

Bases: PySnapError

Report that a VM cannot be deleted because dependent clones exist.

Parameters:

  • subject (str)

  • dependents (list[str])

Return type:

None

PySnap
